title: Oct 2022 Thoughts on 10/7 — loneliness, slave-to-grind, mom-stuck-in-cycle, Pokemon Go AR
html:
Oct 2022 Thoughts on 10/7 — loneliness, slave-to-grind, mom-stuck-in-cycle, Pokemon Go AR

Source: 2022-10-15 Google Doc. The fullest pre-2023 manifesto-style note — combines Mike Vrabel-inspired "success/struggle suck if you can't share" meditation with the mom-needs-rescuing thesis and a Pokemon-Go-AR business musing.

TL;DR

  • Loneliness as the throughline: Yahir characterizes himself as a "very lone individual; lonely individual" who sometimes chooses it. Quotes Mike Vrabel: "Success sucks in this life if you can't share it with someone." Then adds his own contrast: "suffering or struggle really sucks in this life, if you can't share it with someone."
  • The someone-to-love spec: someone "that gives me another beautiful and meaningful reason to live. Someone that is willing to try new things with me, and that truly supports me every step of the way. Also, someone that has aspiration and great passions of their own." — the life companion spec in early form.
  • The "girls attracted to drama" observation: "Many girls seem to be attractive to mfers with problems and issues. That drama sometimes feels like it is something that they seek." — Yahir's read on dating dynamics at OSU.
  • Slave-to-grind warning: people who feel the void fill it with drugs (one path) or with grind (Yahir's path, named explicitly): "becoming a slave to responsibility. If the burden is constantly on you, you don't have to focus on the pits, but can instead patch them with other illusion BS."
  • Solitude as universal: "If you want to build and create something that affects the lives of a billion people, solitude affects the lives of every human (except the exceptions) that has walked this earth."
  • Pokemon GO AR meditation: "Pokemon GO comes to mind, where the AR world meshes very naturally with the IRL. How will that happen with VR, and what would that look like?" — proto-thinking that becomes Wrld Side Quests 18 months later.
  • The mom-cycle line (the core motivation): "Listening to my mom talk about how she is feeling the exhaustion and reduced energy from working at the farm she's at is fucking numbing. She has implied and subtly mentioned that she thinks that she may need to pivot sometime soon. My mom is 50. And is in short term stints. It is burdening, maybe in a good way, but I don't like saying this, but my mom will remain in this vicious financial cycle if I don't do something to break her out."
  • The NPC reframe: "I could stop living and nothing in this world would change... I will just die like another random NPC. And that does dishearten me a bit, but its probably alright. Don't reach for glory, just become within your boundaries... become the utmost example of good."

Pattern observed

This is the single most important "why I'm building" note in the corpus: it lays out all four motivations at once — loneliness + life-companion + mom-rescue + slave-to-grind self-awareness. Three of the four become recurring through-lines:

  • Mom-rescue → mom house by the river verbatim line in 2022 06 14 being then experience and 2024 10 30 thoughts on my future.
  • Life-companion spec → expanded in 2023 12 29 vision for big life and tested against Emily.
  • Slave-to-grind self-awareness → still present in 2026 02 26 fall backwards into void (he calls it "I want to live my life on my own terms, weird terms").

The Pokemon Go meditation is also notable as the earliest captured AR/VR-spatial-computing thought in the corpus.

Key quote

"Don't reach for glory, just become within your boundaries and while riding the boundaries, become the utmost example of good."

Open questions

  • Mom's farm job in 2022 — what was it? (By March 2025 she's at Olive Garden — different job.)
  • The "by releasing that tension to be the best, you can then become the best" — is this a Yahir-original or borrowed?
